ref: As soon as Ananias heard this, he dropped dead, and everyone who heard about it was frightened.

ref: Crispus was the leader of the synagogue. He and everyone in his family put their faith in the Lord. Many others in Corinth also heard the message, and all the people who had faith in the Lord were baptized.

translated: Krispus, the ruler of the synagogue, believed in the Lord, along with his entire household; and many of the Corinthians, when they heard, believed and were baptized.

ref: The captain went with some of the temple police and brought the apostles back. But they did not use force. They were afraid that the people might start throwing stones at them.
text: Kliso…Ф, ag…Ыe…Цi akaavuћГ…Ф nabha …Фpl…Ыn…Ф y…Ыax…ФћГ…Ыw…Фaa av…Ы ad…Ыgbana ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы amana. Bag…Ы gbanaћА bal…Ы n…Ы t…ЫgagaliћГ m…Ы, …Фm…Фs…Ы beesi kifuћА as…Ы bag…Ы akpas…Ы b…Фd…ФћГ ebehu al…Ы aklagbu.

translated: The dog that bit the hunter's testicles is not far away.

ref: One of them was Lydia, who was from the city of Thyatira and sold expensive purple cloth. She was a worshiper of the Lord God, and he made her willing to accept what Paul was saying.

ref: I am bound by these chains because of what we people of Israel hope for. This is why I have called you here to talk about this hope of ours.

translated: When this happens, it will be time for him to gather his chosen ones. And then, he will send his angels to gather his chosen people from the ends of the earth.

text: Bat…Ф…Ц…Ф kiwui as…Ы t…Ы babam…Ф Paulo, k…Ыl…Ы bal…Ы an…Ф n…ФћА g…Ыaba ebekpe at…Ф…Ц…Ф n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы g…Ы Paulo azaћГa. On the day of his death, he appeared to me in a dream and said that I should go to Owusoso Akaa and bring a certain book, and that I should tell his children that they should remember the death of Moses and the resurrection of our Lord Jesus Christ.

text: P…Ф Owusoso Akaa apl…Ыn…Ф m…Ы, oboyin…Ф obo kiwui …Ыl…Ы abha, kliso …Ыl…Ф…ЫtitiћБ n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы p…Ы …Ыdal…Ы ebui m…Ы …Фk…Ф bun…Ф bhlui bhlui n…ЫћА behohoe…Ы petee sh…Фsh…Ф…Ы. ∆Рt…Ы…Ы…Ц…Ф kibui nanaћА falan…Ф k…Ыg…Ы ebui…Ц…Фluan…Ы n…ЫћА Mose a…Ц…Ф eluћБ…Ф as…Ы k…ЫbaћАba …Ыl…Ы m…Ы shu,

translated: If you do not know the person who did it, then the elders will consult the gods to find out who did it.

translated: Kliso…Ф, the world and its desires pass away, but whoever does the will of God lives forever. This is the message you heard from the beginning: We should love one another. Do not be like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and murdered his brother.
